Government of Maharashtra
Soil and Water Conservation Department
GOVERNMENT ORDER NUMBER 2025 / P.No.230 / JAL-2
Martyr Rajguru Chowk, Madam Cama Road,
Mantralaya, Mumbai - 400032
Date: June 4, 2026
Reference - Department of Soil and Water Conservation, Government Decision No. Establishment-2023 / No.264 (Part-I) / E-1265345 / Jal-II, Govt. 27/05/2026.
Government Orders -

The following table shows the names of Water Conservation Officers in the Department of Soil and Water Conservation, Group-B (Gazetted) (Revised Designation - Senior Engineer / Assistant Engineer Grade-II) (Pay Scale 85-16 (Rs. 44900 - 142400 / -) (7th Pay Commission) Sub Divisional Water Conservation Officer (Construction) and other equivalent posts Group "ap (Revised Designation - Deputy Assistant, Soil Water Conservation) (Pay Scale - 3-20 Rs. 56100 - 177500 / -) is being promoted on a provisional basis to the vacant post in the promotion quota in this cadre. The officers who have been promoted to the rank of this cadre are being posted on temporary promotion in the interest of public service and administrative convenience as follows.

para_trans: GOVERNMENT ORDER NUMBER: ASTAP 2025 / P.No.230 / JAL-2
2) The above mentioned promotion is being given in a purely temporary form subject to the following conditions.

1. Ma. The Special Leave Petition No. Survey vacancies in the quota of promotion subject to 28306/2017. The approval is being given in accordance with the instructions of the Government Decision dated 7th May, 2021 of the Executive Board, S.P.V. / 16B regarding net provisional filling up as per the service superiority located at 25.5.2004. Also, vide Government Decision dated 7th May, 2021, Shri. The same is being agreed upon subject to a final decision which is being challenged in the High Court, Bombay.
The Government reserves the right to cancel the promotion granted to the said officers without any prior notice or intimation.
3) In the intervening period, the revised structure of the department was determined by the Government decision in question.
Changes have been made in the designation of the technical category as in Annexure-O. In accordance with the
Necessary corrections in the service system / designation will be made in due course.
4) General Administration Department Notification. Under 21/6/2021 "Maharashtra Civil Service (Seniority
Regulation) Rules, 2021 "has been published. All terms and conditions of this notification shall be governed by this order.
All officers who are promoted will continue to apply.
5) Sub-Divisional Water Conservation Officer (Architecture) and other equivalent officers promoted as above.
Posts Group "A" (Revised Designation - Deputy Commissioner, Soil & Water Conservation) Net of the above mentioned post in this cadre
In case of non-acceptance of temporary promotion, the General Administration Department, Government Decision No. SRV No-
2015 / P.S.No.303 / Ka-12D Action will be taken under 12/9/2016.
